name: Apple Crunch Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and core the apples; shred the unpeeled apples for the recipe.
2. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon into a mixing bowl.
3. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until fine crumbs form.
4. Combine egg and milk. Add to dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Stir in apples.
6. Spoon batter into paper-lined 2 1/2-inch muffin-pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
7. Sprinkle with Nut Crunch Topping.
8. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
Nut Crunch Topping:
1/4 cup Brown Sugar (Packed)
1/4 cup Chopped Pecans
1/2 teaspoon Ground Cinnamon
